title: Full residual macro chest: L=3 S=3 witnesses at n=3,4; no-gos at n=5,6

negative_L2_n3.claim: No common-anchor split-weight length-two Parikh-balanced Fibonacci macro exists for n=3 on any deterministic ternary clock

positive_L3_n3.claim: Exact n=3 length-three split-weight common-anchor Parikh-balanced macro on a 3-state clock

positive_L3_n4.claim: Exact n=4 length-three split-weight common-anchor Parikh-balanced macro on a 3-state clock

negative_L3_n5_s3.claim: No n=5 L=3 S=3 common-anchor split macro (exhaustive routability)

negative_L3_n6_s3.claim: No n=6 L=3 S=3 common-anchor split macro (exhaustive; dies at outward)

open_loopholes: n=5 L=3 S>=4 exhaustive (sample: 0 routable / 48 outward among 3000 clocks)
structural all-n for L=3 S=3 (n=3,4 yes; n=5,6 no; n>=7 port no-go)
claim_boundary: Finite machine objects for the common-anchor split-integral deterministic ternary macro model. Not an Erdős 142 solution.
